issues.detail: The skill does not explicitly cover error handling or edge cases beyond basic route examples.
The skill assumes a Node.js environment and Docker, limiting applicability to agents without these tools.

scenarios.name: User-by-id mock with rule-based 404
scenarios.rationale: Baseline drafts an Express or json-server config that does not match Mockoon's schema; treatment produces the documented environment with urlParam, faker helpers, and a rules entry targeting params/id equals 999.

scenarios.name: Mockoon CLI in a GitHub Actions workflow
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for json-server or wiremock and misses the @mockoon/cli flags; treatment runs npx @mockoon/cli start --data ... --port 3001 in the background and sets API_BASE_URL for the test step as shown in the skill.
